title: Perakuan Pendaftaran
brief: The core CIDB contractor registration certificate under the CIDB Act 1994. Grade G7 — the highest grade — authorises FDZ Engineering to tender for construction projects of unlimited contract value across three categories: Building (B), Civil Engineering (CE), and Mechanical & Electrical (ME).

meta.label: Gred CE
meta.value: CE01 CE03 CE06 CE08 CE10 CE20 CE21 CE24 CE30 CE34 CE36 CE40 CE42 CE43
